full_text:
Lü Xiang 呂翔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Xiang (呂翔). Younger brother of Lü Kuang, whom he followed everywhere. Lü Xiang was affiliated with Yuan Tan, Yuan Shang, and the Wei Kingdom. Lü Xiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
